name: JellyFlare
overview: Rotating announcements with admin dashboard configuration.
description: Displays rotating announcements at the top of the Jellyfin web UI. Messages, colours, scheduling, and a permanent override banner are all managed through the Jellyfin admin dashboard — no file editing required.

versions.changelog:
- permanent banner can be disabled but still saved;
- add customization to hide all button and close button.
- add quick access to the plugin from the dashboard sidebar
